teaser.title: Get Uber Eats, Rappi and DiDi orders straight into your POS
teaser.description: Connect your delivery platforms and orders flow into Avoqado on their own, right alongside your counter sales: same menu, same reports, same inventory.
teaser.benefit1: Orders land directly in your POS, ready to prepare
teaser.benefit2: One place to see counter sales and delivery together
teaser.benefit3: Your menu stays in sync automatically
teaser.needsAdmin: Contact an administrator to enable delivery.

requestDialog.title: Request delivery activation
requestDialog.description: Tell us which platforms you have or want. Our team will reach out to connect your channels.
requestDialog.channelsLabel: Which platforms do you have or want to activate?
requestDialog.notePlaceholder: E.g. I already have Uber Eats, still need Rappi...
requestDialog.toastSuccess: Request sent. We'll reach out soon.

pending.title: We received your request
pending.description: We're connecting your delivery channels. We'll reach out as soon as they're active.
